1a:I[88125,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js","/_next/static/chunks/0jxk-y9t36yrp.js","/_next/static/chunks/03grble4o35rv.js"],"default"]

21:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
6:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Session-Based Isolation"}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":["Each ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance is identified by a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}],". Different sessions maintain separate memory contexts:"]}]
8:["$","$L19",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Separate sessions with isolated memories\nuser_a_mem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"user-alice\")\nuser_b_mem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"user-bob\")\n\n# Alice's memories are isolated from Bob's\nuser_a_mem.remember(content=\"Alice prefers dark mode\", importance=0.5)\nuser_b_mem.remember(content=\"Bob prefers light mode\", importance=0.5)\n\n# Each user only recalls their own context\nuser_a_mem.recall(\"UI preferences\")  # Returns Alice's preferences\nuser_b_mem.recall(\"UI preferences\")  # Returns Bob's preferences\n","language":"python"}]
9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Scope-Based Access"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Use the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scope"}]," parameter on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]," to control visibility within a session:"]}]
b:["$","$L19",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"my-agent\")\n\n# Session-scoped (default) — only visible in this session\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Current task: fixing bug #42\",\n  scope=\"session\",\n)\n\n# Global — visible across all sessions sharing the same DB\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Company style guide link: ...\",\n  scope=\"global\",\n)\n","language":"python"}]
c:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Multi-Tenant Pattern"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Isolate tenants by using separate databases:"}]
e:["$","$L19",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Each tenant gets their own database file\ntenant_a = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"default\", db_path=\"/data/tenant-a/memories.db\")\ntenant_b = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"default\", db_path=\"/data/tenant-b/memories.db\")\n","language":"python"}]
f:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Filesystem Permissions"}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Since Mnemosyne stores data in local SQLite files, standard OS-level access controls apply:"}]
11:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Set restrictive file permissions on the database directory"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Use dedicated OS users for different agent services"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Place database files on encrypted filesystems if required"}],"\n"]}]
12:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L1a",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Local-Only by Default"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne does not expose a network API by default. All access is via the Python SDK, which means access control is governed by your application code and OS-level permissions."}]}]]}]]}]}]
